query:
SELECT
                u.username,
                u.tidal_user_id,
                u.use_playlists as "use_playlists!",
                u.use_favorites as "use_favorites!",
                l.lastfm_username
             FROM subsonic_users u
             LEFT JOIN user_lastfm_links l ON u.username = l.subsonic_username
             WHERE u.tidal_user_id = $1
